other_observers: Nick Moore found the bird, Lisa Edwards, and John Drummond; I believe it was seen the following day.
specific_location: City Park in Haxton, and in someone's yard just to the south
description: Nick Moore yelled "Wood Thrush", while he, Lisa Edwards, John Drummond, and I were at Haxton City Park. We had just seen a Northern Parula and Golden-crowned Kinglet. The thrush was mostly staying on the ground in someone's yard just south of the park. The bird had a very reddish brown colored back, short tail, white underparts with bold black spots. See photos.Behaviors: Staying on the ground mostly, also jumped up to the fence.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
